home.heroSubtitle: CodzHub is an independent software engineering partner. We build clean, high-performance web applications and systems.
home.whyUsDesc: Every line of code we write is optimized for performance, scalability, and clean structure. No bloat, no clutter, just elite engineering.
home.servicesPreviewSubtitle: We specialize in building robust systems tailored to specific business flows.
home.step1Desc: Aligning direct deliverables, establishing type-safety requirements, and defining technical scope.
home.step2Desc: Developing under strict standards, using native modern CSS architectures and type-safe systems.
home.step3Desc: Performing rigorous automated typechecks, builds, linting, and database optimizations.
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Connect directly with our engineering lead to map out the architecture of your solution.

services.title: Software Engineering Services
services.subtitle: High-fidelity development designed to power operations and modern digital products.
services.websitesDesc: High-speed marketing and corporate websites optimized for search engines and user conversion.
services.webSystemsDesc: Custom client portals, content managers, and operations systems built to streamline company work.
services.dashboardsDesc: Responsive, data-driven reporting systems with live charts and real-time data streaming.
services.saasDesc: Multi-tenant software-as-a-service structures designed with scalable databases and clean logic.
services.mobileDesc: High-performance cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android with offline-first support.
services.backendDesc: Robust server configurations, optimized databases, secure APIs, and external tool connections.
services.timelineStep1Desc: Analyzing flows, specifying requirements, and aligning on database architectures.
services.timelineStep2Desc: Writing clean, type-safe code, implementing native responsive interfaces.
services.timelineStep3Desc: Performing builds, types check, lints, and loading speed tests.
services.timelineStep4Desc: Deploying to hosting services, setting up backups, and providing support.

about.title: About CodzHub
about.subtitle: An independent, founder-led software studio built on trust and elite engineering.
about.bioText: CodzHub was founded by Ziad Elsayed to bridge the gap between complex business requirements and clean, performant engineering. We treat code as a craft, ensuring each project receives direct attention from seasoned experts.
about.value1Text: We do not believe in excessive animations or heavy dependencies. We deliver lightweight, blazing-fast native solutions.
about.value2Text: Direct engineering partnerships, complete transparency, and clear expectations without agency overhead.
about.mindsetDesc: We develop software with strict quality parameters. This means standardizing on Typecheck validations, secure SQLite local databases, and native CSS variables without third-party design framework bloat.
about.ctaSubtitle: Direct engineering collaborations for your custom development needs.

contact.title: Book a Project
contact.subtitle: Have a custom system or high-performance app to build? Let's discuss your requirements.
